'''D'Lew''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]. He served in the same mercenary unit as [[Garrett (mercenary)|Garrett]] and [[Darca Nyl]]. He was killed in a [[Battle above spaceport|battle over a spaceport]].
